structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Composition
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Each system shall be broken into separate Zone Groups composed of one or more zones served by a single air handler.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Each system shall be broken into separate Zone Group s composed of a collection of one or more zones served by a single air handler. See Section 3.1.3 for Zone Group assignments.

evidence_quote: Each system shall be broken into separate Zone Group s composed of a collection of one or more zones served by a single air handler. See Section 3.1.3 for Zone Group assignments.
evidence_text: Each system shall be broken into separate Zone Group s composed of a collection of one or more zones served by a single air handler. See Section 3.1.3 for Zone Group assignments.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Independent Schedules and Modes
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Each Zone Group shall be capable of having separate occupancy schedules and operating modes from other Zone Groups.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Zone Groups must support independent occupancy schedules and operating modes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Each Zone Group shall be capable of having separate occupancy schedules and operating modes from other Zone Group s.

evidence_quote: Each Zone Group shall be capable of having separate occupancy schedules and operating modes from other Zone Group s.
evidence_text: Each Zone Group shall be capable of having separate occupancy schedules and operating modes from other Zone Group s.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Mode Propagation
structured_payload_candidate.summary: All zones in a Zone Group shall be in the same zone-group operating mode. If one zone enters any mode other than Unoccupied, all zones in that Zone Group shall enter that mode.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: If one zone in a Zone Group is placed in any zone-group operating mode other than Unoccupied Mode (due to override, sequence logic, or scheduled occupancy).
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: All zones in that Zone Group shall enter that mode.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: All zones in each Zone Group shall be in the same zone -group operating mode as defined in Section 5.4.6 . If one zone in a Zone Group is placed in any zone -group operating mode other than Unoccupied Mode (due to override, sequence logic, or scheduled occupancy ), all zones in that Zone Gro up shall enter that mode.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Occupied-Standby Mode Exclusion
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Occupied-standby mode applies to individual zones, is considered a zonal subset of Occupied Mode, and shall not be considered a zone-group operating mode.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Occupied-standby mode shall not be considered a zone-group operating mode.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Occupied -standby mode applies to individual zones, is considered a zonal subset of Occupied Mode , and shall not be considered a zone-group operating mode .

evidence_quote: Occupied -standby mode applies to individual zones, is considered a zonal subset of Occupied Mode , and shall not be considered a zone-group operating mode .
evidence_text: Occupied -standby mode applies to individual zones, is considered a zonal subset of Occupied Mode , and shall not be considered a zone-group operating mode .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Override Switch Change Behavior
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When a Zone Group's override switch is changed, the corresponding override switch for every zone in the Zone Group shall change to the same value. Subsequently, individual zone switches can be changed independently. The zone-level switch has no effect on the zone-group switch, and the zone-group switch only affects zone-level switches when it is changed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: When the value of a Zone Group’s override switch is changed.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: The corresponding override switch for every zone in the Zone Group shall change to the same value.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the value of a Zone Group ’s override switch is changed, the corresponding override switch for every zone in the Zone Group  shall change to the same value. Subsequently, the zone -level override switch may be changed to a different valu e. The value of the zone -level switch has no effect on the value of the zone -group  switch, and the value of the zone -group  switch only affects the zone -level switches when the zone -group  switch is changed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Operating Modes Requirement
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Each Zone Group shall have the modes shown in the following subsections (Occupied Mode, etc.).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Each Zone Group shall have the modes shown in the following subsections.

evidence_quote: Each Zone Group shall have the modes shown in the following subsections.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Occupied Mode Determination
structured_payload_candidate.summary: A Zone Group is in Occupied Mode when the time is between scheduled start and stop times, or when schedules have been overridden by the occupant override system.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: When any of the following is true: a. The time of day is between the Zone Group’s scheduled occupied start and stop times. b. The schedules have been overridden by the occupant override system.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: The Zone Group shall be in Occupied Mode.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
A Zone Group is in the Occupied Mode when any of the following is true:
a. The time of day is between the Zone Group ’s scheduled occupied start and  stop times.
b. The schedules have been overridden by the occupant override system.
